title: Moving items to different board / group and mapping columns
excerpt: I use a set of template boards in two different languages (English and Dutch). I also translated the column headers. When moving items form a English board to a Dutch board (or visa versa) I get the warning that certain …

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use a set of template boards in two different languages (English and Dutch). I also translated the column headers. When moving items form a English board to a Dutch board (or visa versa) I get the warning that certain columns do not exist in the target board. I want to have the ability to map source column names to target column names when columns are missing in the target board.

Any idea if this enhancement makes any chance or maybe an alternative with Integromat?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @basdebruin

We’re aware of the fact that moving items from board to board when the boards are not identical is not the best experience. We’re working currently on finding a solution which is more likely to focus around an “undo” capability. The mapping you describe will not be developed just yet but might be something we decide to develop in the future.

Watch this space!!
